name: Chicken Breasts with Spicy Rub
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the chicken pieces dry.
2. Combine the ingredients for the rub in a bowl.
3. Smear the rub mixture over both sides of each chicken breast; the more rub used, the spicier it will be.
4. Heat a barbecue or grill and brush the grates with 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil.
5. Place the chicken on the grill, skin side down.
6. Cook over medium heat for about 10 to 12 minutes per side until the chicken is cooked through (if the heat is too high, the coating may burn; if it's too low, cooking time will be slightly longer).
